metadata.title: RadiKal Sector
metadata.author: Dj0z
metadata.description:
A relatively small add-on for Multiverse 5.5.1, which adds a secret sector, many spicy augments (multi-ramming, fire-related, special hacking, repair, internal...), blue options, upgrades, sounds, visuals and combos! Also features a few weapons and 4 ships (3 unlockable) with specific gimmicks. The general theme is powerful but potentially dangerous (to you) experimental tech. More content coming soon!
****** CONTENT ******
RadiKal sector: -Find the reroute coordinates during normal gameplay or buy a double agent from a shop to get those, then reroute as usual. -It's full of danger, sacrifices and rare, powerful equipment! Will you dare enter?
Resource-hungry Combat Augments: -Shipvore Ram: recklessly throw your ship at the enemy, disregarding your fuel reserves and the safety of your crew. Combos with Fuel Conserver and Emergency Generator. -Scorched Earth, for when you want to set your own ship on fire, and benefit from it. Comes with upgrades, streamlining the experience and empowering your crew. -Plasma Teleporter: immediately ignite the enemy ship! Comes with a safe and a risky deployment method.
Other Offensive Augments: -Flammabilizer: deal with fireproof and resistant enemies! -Charged Belts makes your crew damage the ship they're in on death. -Vulnerabilizer: slowly remove the enemy's defenses, with some randomness.
Utility augments: -Enigmashin: gamble with fleet delays through briefly peaceful hacking. -Oxygenizer: spawn an atmosphere at the start of fights.
Defensive augments: -Offense Disabler makes the enemy harmless for a few seconds, progressively restoring their power afterwards. -Punk Harmony uses a bootleg Harmony to automate and empower your Engi, scaling with Mind Control and Hacking. -Defense Kits make your crew much sturdier on your ship. -A.E.R.A. Second Wind can automatically save your ship, once per purchase.
Internal augments: -Mind Heater: in fire, makes your crew resist Mind Control and stun, on both ships. -Demicloners: provides a semblance of cloning when your crew dies without a Clonebay.
Custom weapons: -Bada fissure beam can deal massive damage to large systems, or blow up ships! -Rain of Ions shoots all kinds of ions at once! -Rain of Fire can eventually maintain multiple full strength fires against any ship! -BPS Messenger heavy laser combines the strengths of all 3 RK subfactions.
New crew: -Uptors are made out of Alpha Gouls to fit the needs of the RK Scorch.
3 player ships with unique gimmicks! -Embark on a wild ride with the Rammer, boasting a superior locked version of the Shipvore Ram. -The Scorcher is outfitted with what you need to burn down any enemy. -The Punker plays around its massive reactor, particle accelerator, and special hacking.
****** Changelog ****** CHANGELOG RadiKal Sector v5.82g -NOW REQUIRES FUSION LIBRARY. -Improved some texts.
* Augments -Demicloner: Is now Demicloners: new technology called backpacks allows it to work on both ships. (No I did not lose 3 trained Free Mantis and Ty'Erel while boarding Weapons in the giant auto boss of the ghost sector. Look, If I didn't do that it would have destroyed my ship, okay?) Shell Radiants now demiclone into Shell Guardians instead of normal Shells.
* Crew - New (and first) RadiKal crew subtype, Uptor! Type: ghost. Good survivability, can set random rooms on fire remotely and affect system fire resistance. Demiclones into Phantom Goul Alpha but does not usually count as a Vagabond.
* The RadiKal sector -The event with Theocracy gear buyers and the equivalent Zoltan one are now unique (again). -The RadiKal Deckhands section in stores was renamed RK Associates. The new RadiKals section is for crew exclusive to this add-on (with a discount).
Special thanks to (in no particular order) Arc, Lizzard, codyfun, Qaser7, bamalf, Dr. Nauter, Witherbottom, Chooseche, Eschaton, Pepper, Untitled, Pupi, vertaalfout, Dalvest, Alder, Kix, [Enchanter], Pedrosian96, Royal Slime, [yenlo]R4V3-0N, robinthedragon2, Ehtya (Laythe), Blizz/mr_easy_money, Skye[NikoMaster], Julk, Felipe, marcrusian, Abstrusity and other people who helped on the FTL:MV Discord, for streaming the mod, and valuable information on balance, modding, coding and art.
Feedback? Questions? @Dj0z in the Multiverse server on Discord
Good luck and have fun!
